LanguageData.Ammo_17HMR_FMJ.label: .17 HMR (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_17HMR_FMJ.description: A necked down .22 Magnum rifle cartridge using a .17 caliber bullet, known for its high speed.
LanguageData.Ammo_17HMR_AP.label: .17 HMR (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_17HMR_AP.description: A necked down .22 Magnum rifle cartridge using a .17 caliber bullet, known for its high speed.
LanguageData.Ammo_17HMR_HP.label: .17 HMR (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_17HMR_HP.description: A necked down .22 Magnum rifle cartridge using a .17 caliber bullet, known for its high speed.
LanguageData.Bullet_17HMR_FMJ.label: .17 HMR bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_17HMR_AP.label: .17 HMR bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_17HMR_HP.label: .17 HMR bullet (HP)
